From Ghana to Tech: My Journey

From Ghana to Tech: My Journey

My name is Rahana, and I'm a self-taught developer from Ghana now living in the UK. In 2022, I decided to teach myself to code through online platforms like Udemy and Coursera. What started as curiosity has become a passion for building web applications that solve real problems.

Why I Started Coding

Growing up in Ghana, I saw the power of technology to connect communities. I wanted to be part of creating that change. After moving to the UK to join my partner, I committed to learning full-stack development and building a career in tech.

My Skills

  • HTML & CSS
  • JavaScript & React
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Backend: .NET & C#
  • Database: MySQL & SQL

My Projects

I've built several projects including HireWave (a job board application) and Nevaro (an e-commerce platform). Each project taught me something new about problem-solving and full-stack development.
